title: Question: asynchronous resettable flops and its reset values

features.name: async reset flop with reset value assignment
features.description: Code should include an always block with asynchronous reset sensitivity (posedge clk or negedge reset_n) where the reset branch assigns a specific non-x value to the flop output
features.snippet: always @(posedge clk or negedge reset_n) begin if (!reset_n) qqqq <= 3'b101; else qqqq <= d; end

features.name: async reset flop with reset_n initialized to 0
features.description: Code should include an asynchronous reset flop where the reset_n input signal is initialized to 0 at time 0 without any clock edge occurring
